target.boundary_statement: The durable record store and its publication/read lifecycle.

codebase_doctrine_intent.primary_invariant: Only committed records are externally visible.
codebase_doctrine_intent.proof_bar: Current code and tests plus Git failure evidence for durable claims.
codebase_doctrine_intent.compatibility_posture: Preserve public behavior unless doctrine proves it invalid.
codebase_doctrine_intent.persistence_posture: Conversational by default; persist only on request.
